title: Vegapunk Reveals the Sinking World
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, World Government, Zoro, Unknown person #11, Vegapunk, Unknown person #12 as Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.
scene: Vegapunk’s message shakes the world by connecting the Void Century, Joy Boy, ancient weapons, the sinking world, and the Five Elders’ desperate attempt to stop the truth.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hey, did you know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Orange Town, East Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...that waaaay back when, 20 kings...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: ...teamed up to create the world?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wonder if this old timer knows about any of 'em.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: WOOF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Despite this, any attempts to decipher the Doneglyphs...

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: ...is considered taboo by the world government.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I betrayed the government and studied this forbidden era myself.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, I felt compelled to commit my second grave sin.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I was fortunate enough to inherit...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Several documents from a certain group of exceptional archeologists, and that allowed me to decipher a number of DoneGlyphs...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: ZORO- SAAAN!! JINBE- SAAAN!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I pursued this research as far as possible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And I have no regrets!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: History is a story, after all.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Whoa! The ground's moving!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The clouds are stretching?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This must be what Edison was talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right! With the edge of the clouds further out, we'll be able leap right into the ocean!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: weez, weez

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Y'all straw hats had better make it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don'tcha dare get caught...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...by the government!!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: And in truth...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I only know a small fragment of this 100- year-long tale!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wouldn't be right to leave you with Baseless speculation...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So I'll limit myself to the facts as I know them!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...was born 900 years ago in a beautiful and advanced kingdom...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This next move is gonna work!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And just like the legendary Sun God Nika from the fables of Elbaf,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He too fought with a stretchy and elastic body...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They called him Joy boy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Enough, straw hat! It's point- less!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: The star of this story...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Stop it!! You're gracking us up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He was the first man to take to the seas!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first one to be called a Pirate!!

summary: This part advances the Vegapunk’s Broadcast through 39 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
